name: validate-client-intelligence-packet
description: Accept a real Merraine intelligence packet and reject an unsafe incomplete packet.
given: The opulent-gtm-intelligence skill validator and packets containing live-client evidence identifiers.
when: The validator runs against a complete packet and a packet with invalid dates, scores, confidence, evidence, contact provenance, and verification.
then: The complete packet exits zero and the unsafe packet exits non-zero with blocking issues.

name: render-merraine-relationship-intelligence
description: Render a client-ready relationship intelligence overview and dossiers from publicly evidenced Merraine engagements.
given: A real Merraine packet using Mayberg Foundation, ACSZ, and Oak Valley Hospital District public evidence.
when: The packet is validated and rendered through the bundled HTML templates.
then: The overview and three dossiers exist, contain relationship paths and risks, contain no unresolved tokens, and preserve public-evidence labels.
